name: Playbar Quality Badge
author: Wilk087
description: Adds audio format information and Hi-Res badges to the playbar and immersive mode.

showInPlayerBar.label: Show in player bar
showInPlayerBar.description: Display the quality badge next to the transport controls

showInImmersive.label: Show in immersive mode
showInImmersive.description: Display the quality badge in the fullscreen/immersive view
